prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划:
2021–2025年物理类最低位次约26530→28191→25505→24169→23889，整体呈波动中缓慢前移趋势，近两年位次持续提升（数字减小），2025年基准约23889名。
2. 【招生计划】本省物理类计划2021年2892人→2022年2745人→2023年3070人→2024年2784人→2025年2883人→2026年2957人，较2025年扩招约2.6%，扩招幅度温和，对竞争压力 有一定缓解但有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2026年第77名，近年排名稳定在72–81区间，属中上游211；2024年声誉评价偏 负面（校园安全事件），2026年周期内无显著声誉事件；抖音热度排名第88位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量处于同类211中下游，未出现明显报考热度信号；第 五轮学科评估化学A-，为该校唯一A类学科；化学工程与技术、机械工程、电气工程等工科实力较强，与省内产业需求匹配，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与福大优势工科方向吻合；福建省2026年考生总数约26.79万，较2025年（约25.23万）增加约6.2%，按历史比例估 算物理类考生约20.4万，竞争加剧；福州大学位于福建省省会，为本省招生主力，本地考生报 考意愿较强，省内招生占比高，地域偏好稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年持续前移、2026年小幅扩招约2.6%、本省考生总数明显增加约6.2%以及声誉热度一般等因素 ，扩招对位次的向下拉动与考生增加对位次的向上推升相互对冲，但考生增幅大于扩招幅度，预计竞争略有加剧。预测2026年物理类最低位次约24357名，区间23857–24857名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 26530 → 28191 → 25505 → 24169 → 23889, showing a fluctuating but slowly advancing trend overall, with rankings continuously improving (numbers decreasing) in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 23889th place.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 2892 in 2021 → 2745 in 2022 → 3070 in 2023 → 2784 in 2024 → 2883 in 2025 → 2957 in 2026, an increase of about 2.6% compared to 2025. The expansion is moderate, providing some but limited relief to competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 77th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 72–81 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; reputation evaluation in 2024 was somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), with no significant reputation events in the 2026 cycle; Douyin popularity ranking 88th, rated as average, short video exposure is in the lower-middle range among similar 211 universities, showing no obvious application heat signal; fifth round discipline evaluation: Chemistry A-, the only A-class discipline; Chemical Engineering and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering and other engineering disciplines are relatively strong, matching the industrial needs of the province, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended, consistent with Fuzhou University's advantageous engineering directions; the total number of examinees in Fujian Province in 2026 is about 267,900, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025 (about 252,300). Estimated Physics Category examinees are about 204,000 based on historical proportions, intensifying competition; Fuzhou University is located in the provincial capital of Fujian Province, serving as the main enrollment force for the province, with strong local examinee willingness to apply, high proportion of in-province enrollment, and stable regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous advancement of historical rankings in the past two years, a small enrollment expansion of about 2.6% in 2026, a significant increase of about 6.2% in the total number of provincial examinees, and average reputation and popularity, the downward pull on rankings from expansion and the upward push from increased examinees offset each other, but the examinee increase is greater than the expansion rate, so competition is expected to intensify slightly. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 24357th place, with a range of 23857–24857th place.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 24357th place, range 23857–24857th place. It is recommended that examinees within the predicted ranking range use Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. Examinees with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<23857th place) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship engineering majors; examinees with rankings near the upper limit of the range (about 24857th place) should mainly choose Tier 2 majors and cautiously select Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 6063 → 5670 → 5011 → 4775 → 4695, showing a continuous forward trend (numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative forward shift of about 1368 places over the past 5 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 4695 places; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 245 in 2021 → 242 in 2022 → 249 in 2023 → 278 in 2024 → 284 in 2025 → 304 in 2026, an expansion of about 7.0% compared to 2025, with a relatively significant expansion rate.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 77th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years; reputation evaluation in 2024 was somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), with no significant reputation events in the 2026 cycle; Douyin popularity ranking 88th, with average evaluation, no obvious application heat signal; fifth round discipline evaluation Chemistry A-, but History Category enrollment majors are mainly economics, management, literature, and law, with weak correlation to chemistry; law, accounting, Chinese language and literature, etc., are popular directions for History Category.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social heat for liberal arts majors such as law, Chinese language and literature, and accounting is recommended to be differentiated and wait-and-see; the total number of examinees in Fujian Province in 2026 is about 267,900, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025, with an estimated 64,000 History Category examinees based on historical proportions, intensifying competition; Fuzhou University is located in the provincial capital of Fujian, one of the main choices for provincial History Category examinees, with a high proportion of provincial enrollment and stable regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 expansion of about 7.0%, and the increase of provincial History Category examinees by about 6.2%, the expansion rate is slightly larger than the examinee growth rate, which has a downward pulling effect on rankings, but the inertia of the continuous forward shift of History Category rankings in recent years is strong. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 4923, with a range of 4423–5423.
